title: Filesystem & Mounts
html:
Filesystem & Mounts

Contents

  • Disk / partition overview
  • Mount / unmount
  • /etc/fstab format
  • Create / repair filesystems
  • Swap

Disk / partition overview

CommandDescription
 
lsblk -f
block devices with filesystem info
blkid
list UUIDs / labels
df -hT
free space per mount, with FS type
du -sh *
size per top-level entry
du -sh * | sort -h
sorted by size
ncdu /
interactive disk usage explorer
findmnt
tree of mounted filesystems
mount | column -t
all mounts, columnar

Mount / unmount

CommandDescription
 
mount /dev/sdb1 /mnt
ad-hoc mount
mount -t cifs //server/share /mnt -o user=foo
SMB share
mount -t nfs server:/exp /mnt
NFS
mount -o loop disk.img /mnt
loopback (iso, raw image)
mount -o remount,rw /
remount root read-write
umount /mnt
unmount
umount -l /mnt
lazy unmount (busy mount)
losetup -a
list active loop devices
losetup -fP disk.img
attach + auto-detect partitions

/etc/fstab format

Six fields per line: device mountpoint fstype options dump pass

UUID=abc-123  /data  ext4  defaults,noatime  0  2
//srv/share   /mnt   cifs  _netdev,credentials=/root/.smb  0  0
tmpfs         /tmp   tmpfs defaults,size=2G   0  0
CommandDescription
 
mount -a
mount everything in fstab
systemctl daemon-reload
after editing fstab on systemd

Create / repair filesystems

CommandDescription
 
mkfs.ext4 -L data /dev/sdb1
ext4 with label
mkfs.xfs /dev/sdb1
XFS
mkfs.vfat -F32 /dev/sdb1
FAT32
fsck -y /dev/sdb1
check and auto-fix
tune2fs -l /dev/sdb1
ext fs metadata
resize2fs /dev/sdb1
grow ext4 to fill partition

Swap

CommandDescription
 
swapon --show
active swaps
free -h
memory + swap summary
fallocate -l 2G /swapfile && chmod 600 /swapfile
create 2 GB swap file
mkswap /swapfile && swapon /swapfile
format and activate
